entity.label: Eliezer
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Son of Zichri, and chief of the Reubenites under David (1 Chr. 27:16).

nodes.label: Eliezer
nodes.description: Son of Zichri, and chief of the Reubenites under David (1 Chr. 27:16).

verses.text: Furthermore over the tribes of Israel: the ruler of the Reubenites was Eliezer the son of Zichri: of the Simeonites, Shephatiah the son of Maachah:
